titleStmt.title: SII 19.191: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 191. (A.R. No. 135 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAṆAVĀḶEŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a tax-free sale of a land situated along the river at Kuṟiyākkuḍimaṅgalam by the sabhā of Viḍēlvīḍugu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Nallāṟṟūr-nāḍu to the revenue authorities of the state (puravuvari-tiṇaikkaḷattār) for 3�0 kāśu (for being assigned to the temple). Mention is made, while giving the boundaries of the land, of a previous sale of another position of the land to one Vīraśēkhara-Mūvēndavēḷār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 7Āvatu vaṭakarai nallāṟṟūrnāṭṭu
brahmadeyam viṭelviṭukucaturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭu
tta nilavilaiyāvaṇam puravarittiṇaikkaḷattārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāva
tu pūvaṟpū kiḻūr kuṟiyākkuṭimaṅkalattu Āṟṟaṅkarai neṭuṅkollaiyi
l muṉpu viracekaramuventaveḷārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam nikki Ittoṭu
makkukkumeṟku Irukol Akalattāl teṟku nokki Āṟṟuk
pāka nikki Ataṟku kiḻakku kollaiyum ceriyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom Irukālāvatum mukkālā vatum
iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Ūriṉ kiḻūr kuṟiyākkuṭimaṅkalattu Āṟṟaṅkarai neṭuṅkollaiyil muṉ vira ce
karamuventaveḷārkku viṟṟa nilam nikki Itanoṭum Aṭaiya kiḻakkaṭaiya kiḻakku meṟku Iruko
l Akalattāl Āṟṟukke Uruvi nikki Itaṉukku kiḻakku kollaiyum ceriyum viṟṟu
kkuṭuttom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai yuṭi Ellaikku meṟku te
ṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku kaṇṭiyūrār piṇaṅkoṇṭerikku kiḻakkum meṟku Irukol Akalam pe
ruvaḻi yaruvivaḻikku meṟku nokki ponta peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai peru makkuḷa vaḻi
yāka vaitta Irukolnilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṭalaṅkuṭiyār vāykkāl kalpa
kamāṇikkavāykkāl maṇyāṭṭukku teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa ni
lam kollaiyum ceriyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom kuṭuttu Iṉ nilamum ce
riyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷil Iccerimel muṉṉā
ḷ Uḷḷa kalam muppatu kācum Ivarkaḷe kācu kuṭuttu ceṉṟu koḷḷakaṭavarkaḷāka nikki niṉṟutu
Epperppaṭṭatum Āvaṇakkaḷattey kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu Ituve vilaiyā
vaṇamum Ituve poriḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccelavolaiyum Āvatākavu mip �
lai vilai yāvaṇa māvitākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccelavo
laik kāṭṭakkaṭavarkaḷ Allātatākavum ḷaiyum Iṟaippoṉṉuṭ
kā m Ariciyum nellu paṭṭatu tākavum Antarāyatiyum I
ṟai nāṅkaḷe sabhaiyo m Ivarkaḷ Iṟaiyili Uṇṇa
la peṟuvarākavum Ipparicu viṟṟu ceytu kuṭuttom puravu varittiṇaikka
ḷattārkku meṟcollappaṭṭa viṭelviṭukucatūrvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom paṇiyā
l kai natti brahmapriyaneṉ puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattom Ikollai
rāticcavaṟ kaḷa kiḻārkaḷ
ttom tiruve
rmam
vuvari tiṇaikkaḷa
śva[rarakṣai] .
Digital edition of SII 19.191 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
